metadata.description: Multi-tentacled orchestration plugin for Factory AI Droid

plugins.name: claude-octopus
plugins.description: v9.48.0 - adds the xAI Grok CLI as a first-class provider; plus reliability fixes: crash-safe stale-lock recovery for atomic_json_update, hardened hook-test isolation (no more deleting tracked repo files), and late-tangle-completion reconciliation. 32 personas, 49 commands, 54 skills. Run /octo:setup.
